author: y4rr
content: Result: IMG_EXTENSIONS already matches torchvision 0.21 exactly — 9 extensions, same set, same order. The leading-dot difference (torchvision uses '.jpg' vs ferrotorch 'jpg') is intentional by design: has_extension_ci extracts the extension without the dot using Path::extension(). Zero code changes required. BEFORE/AFTER: same value.
